Operation 'cancelConversion' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The original summary uses 'Create a cancellation conversion' which is semantically confusing - the operation cancels conversions rather than creates them. The description lacks clarity on the operation's effects (commission reversal, earnings impact) and doesn't explain what is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the action (cancellation, not creation), explains the side effects (commission reversal, earnings adjustment), specifies input requirements, and describes the response for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Cancel a conversion by order ID, optionally specifying individual SKUs to cancel.
data.summary_suggestion: Cancel a conversion by order ID
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an existing conversion record by order ID, with the option to cancel specific SKUs within that order or the entire conversion. This operation reverses the commission impact of the conversion and updates affiliate earnings accordingly. Requires the order ID and optionally accepts a list of SKU identifiers to selectively cancel. Returns confirmation of the cancellation with updated conversion status.
data.reasoning: The original summary uses 'Create a cancellation conversion' which is semantically confusing - the operation cancels conversions rather than creates them. The description lacks clarity on the operation's effects (commission reversal, earnings impact) and doesn't explain what is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the action (cancellation, not creation), explains the side effects (commission reversal, earnings adjustment), specifies input requirements, and describes the response for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getAffiliate' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains input options but lacks information about what is returned. Added return value details to improve AI agent understanding of the response structure.

data.current_description: Retrieve affiliate details by ID or affiliate code.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed affiliate information by ID or affiliate code. Returns an AffiliateDetail object containing personal information, status, and commission settings.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains input options but lacks information about what is returned. Added return value details to improve AI agent understanding of the response structure.

message: Operation 'editAffiliate' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description lacks return value information and clarity about partial update behavior. Added details about response structure and partial update semantics to help AI agents understand the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Update one or more affiliates with new field values. At least one field besides ID must be provided.
data.description_suggestion: Update affiliate information for one or more affiliates with new field values. Requires at least one field besides ID. Returns a BatchUpdateResponse indicating success/failure for each affiliate. Only provided fields are modified; other fields remain unchanged.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks return value information and clarity about partial update behavior. Added details about response structure and partial update semantics to help AI agents understand the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'searchAffiliates' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is concise and clear. Description explains search parameters but omits return value information. Added details about response structure and matching behavior for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Search affiliates by keyword (ID or email), with optional name filters.
data.description_suggestion: Search affiliates by keyword (ID or email) with optional name filters. Returns an AffiliateListResponse containing matching affiliate records. Supports partial matching on searchable fields.
data.reasoning: Summary is concise and clear. Description explains search parameters but omits return value information. Added details about response structure and matching behavior for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'listAffiliates' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains pagination limits but lacks information about the response structure. Added details about return value and pagination metadata to improve AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve all affiliates with pagination support. Max 100 per call.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all affiliates with pagination support (max 100 per call). Returns an AffiliateListResponse containing paginated affiliate records and pagination metadata for retrieving additional results.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains pagination limits but lacks information about the response structure. Added details about return value and pagination metadata to improve AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'changeAffiliateStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description lacks return value and side effect information. Added details about response structure and the operational impact of status changes to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: Change the status of one or more affiliates. Max 50 IDs per call.
data.description_suggestion: Change the status of one or more affiliates (max 50 IDs per call). Returns a BatchUpdateResponse indicating success/failure for each affiliate. Status changes affect affiliate visibility and commission eligibility in the system.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks return value and side effect information. Added details about response structure and the operational impact of status changes to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.

message: Operation 'createManualCommissionCredit' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the operation but lacks clarity on positive/negative amounts, return value, and side effects. Added details about amount semantics, response structure, and system state changes for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Manually credit a commission to an affiliate. Commission amount can be negative.
data.description_suggestion: Manually credit a commission to an affiliate account. Commission amount can be positive (credit) or negative (debit). Returns a ConversionResponse confirming the credit. Updates the affiliate's commission balance and creates an audit trail for the transaction.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description explains the operation but lacks clarity on positive/negative amounts, return value, and side effects. Added details about amount semantics, response structure, and system state changes for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'changeConversionStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical details about inputs (batch processing, conversion IDs), outputs (batch response format), and side effects (impact on commissions and payouts). Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Manually change the status of one or more conversions.
data.description_suggestion: Manually change the status of one or more conversions. Accepts a batch of conversion IDs with new status values. Returns a batch update response indicating success or failure for each conversion. Status changes affect commission calculations and affiliate payouts.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about inputs (batch processing, conversion IDs), outputs (batch response format), and side effects (impact on commissions and payouts). Added these details to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createConversionTrigger' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing details about what inputs are required (trigger type, value) and what is returned (trigger ID, status). Added clarification about the automatic attribution behavior to help AI agents understand the operation's effect.

data.current_description: Create a conversion trigger (coupon, SKU, or email) for an affiliate to enable automatic conversion tracking.
data.description_suggestion: Create a conversion trigger (coupon, SKU, or email) for an affiliate to enable automatic conversion tracking. Specify the trigger type and associated value. Returns the created trigger details including trigger ID and status. Once created, matching transactions are automatically attributed to the affiliate.
data.reasoning: Missing details about what inputs are required (trigger type, value) and what is returned (trigger ID, status). Added clarification about the automatic attribution behavior to help AI agents understand the operation's effect.

message: Operation 'deleteConversionTriggers' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing output details (what is returned) and side effects (impact on conversion tracking). Added information about batch response format and the consequence of deletion to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Delete one or more conversion triggers for affiliates. Max 50 triggers per request.
data.description_suggestion: Delete one or more conversion triggers for affiliates. Max 50 triggers per request. Accepts a list of trigger IDs. Returns a batch response confirming deletion status for each trigger. Deleted triggers will no longer automatically track conversions for their associated affiliates.
data.reasoning: Missing output details (what is returned) and side effects (impact on conversion tracking). Added information about batch response format and the consequence of deletion to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'manualCreditOrderId' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing specific input requirements (order ID, affiliate ID) and output details (what confirmation includes, commission calculation). Added these details to clarify what data is needed and what result to expect.

data.current_description: Manually credit an affiliate with an existing order ID, automating commission assignment for orders not automatically captured.
data.description_suggestion: Manually credit an affiliate with an existing order ID, automating commission assignment for orders not automatically captured. Requires order ID and affiliate ID. Returns confirmation of the credit including calculated commission amount and status. Creates a conversion record linked to the specified order.
data.reasoning: Missing specific input requirements (order ID, affiliate ID) and output details (what confirmation includes, commission calculation). Added these details to clarify what data is needed and what result to expect.

message: Operation 'createSkuLevelCommission' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing input details (offer ID, SKU-commission mappings) and output details (what confirmation includes, validation errors). Added clarification about override behavior to help AI agents understand the operation's effect on commission calculations.

data.current_description: Add product-specific commission rates to an offer. Requires a plan that supports SKU/Product Level Commissions. Max 50 SKUs per request.
data.description_suggestion: Add product-specific commission rates to an offer. Requires a plan that supports SKU/Product Level Commissions. Max 50 SKUs per request. Accepts offer ID and SKU-commission rate mappings. Returns confirmation of created SKU commissions including any validation errors. Overrides default offer commission rates for specified products.
data.reasoning: Missing input details (offer ID, SKU-commission mappings) and output details (what confirmation includes, validation errors). Added clarification about override behavior to help AI agents understand the operation's effect on commission calculations.

message: Operation 'generateReportDownloadLink' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing input details (what report parameters or ID are required) and output details (URL format, expiration timestamp). Added clarification about link accessibility and expiration behavior to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and constraints.

data.current_description: Generate a public download link for a report. Links expire after 2 minutes.
data.description_suggestion: Generate a public download link for a report. Links expire after 2 minutes. Accepts report parameters or report ID. Returns a temporary download URL and expiration timestamp. The generated link can be shared and accessed without authentication until expiration.
data.reasoning: Missing input details (what report parameters or ID are required) and output details (URL format, expiration timestamp). Added clarification about link accessibility and expiration behavior to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and constraints.

Operation 'cancelConversion' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The original summary uses 'Create a cancellation conversion' which is semantically confusing - the operation cancels conversions rather than creates them. The description lacks clarity on the operation's effects (commission reversal, earnings impact) and doesn't explain what is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the action (cancellation, not creation), explains the side effects (commission reversal, earnings adjustment), specifies input requirements, and describes the response for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Cancel a conversion by order ID, optionally specifying individual SKUs to cancel.
data.summary_suggestion: Cancel a conversion by order ID
data.description_suggestion: Cancels an existing conversion record by order ID, with the option to cancel specific SKUs within that order or the entire conversion. This operation reverses the commission impact of the conversion and updates affiliate earnings accordingly. Requires the order ID and optionally accepts a list of SKU identifiers to selectively cancel. Returns confirmation of the cancellation with updated conversion status.
data.reasoning: The original summary uses 'Create a cancellation conversion' which is semantically confusing - the operation cancels conversions rather than creates them. The description lacks clarity on the operation's effects (commission reversal, earnings impact) and doesn't explain what is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the action (cancellation, not creation), explains the side effects (commission reversal, earnings adjustment), specifies input requirements, and describes the response for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.
